title: Missouri Association of Disability Examiners — Constitution and Bylaws
description: Combined constitution and bylaws of the Missouri Association of Disability Examiners, a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE); last revised 8/2005. Covers name, status under NADE, purpose, membership, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary-Historian, Treasurer, Conference Manager), the Board of Directors and Executive Committee, committees, meetings, elections (including proxy procedure), membership year, formation of district chapters, awards/recognition, dues installment payment, amendments, and rules of order.
geographic_coverage: Missouri (statewide, with optional district chapters matching District Disability Offices)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Missouri Chapter
source.title: Constitution and Bylaws of the Missouri Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Missouri-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived. Document header states '(last revised 8/2005)', captured as temporal_coverage. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
